copy-core-plugin-translates-from-desc: Copies the translations of the core and active plugins of the selected language to this language.
copy-custom-translates-from-desc: Copies custom translations created with this plugin from the selected language to this language.
copy-translate-exists: The translation already exists in the language %lang%.
copy-translate-ok: The translation in the language %lang% has been copied successfully.
copy-translate-to-desc: Copies the selected translation to another language.
copy-translates-found: %found% translations that already exist have been found.
copy-translates-no-translations: There are no translations to copy, surely the language %lang% does not have translations or they already exist in this language.
duplicate-key-translate: This key (%key%) is already being used in the selected language (%lang%).
file-saved-correctly: The file %filePath% has been saved successfully.
search-key-or-value: Search by value or by translation
search-key-or-value-desc: If you need to find a translation and don't know where it is, you can search by its value or the translation, and it will tell you which translation files it appears in.
